note: v403: Budget page polish. Added paydown progress bars — the month hero shows a green bar with '$X paid · $Y left', and each paycheck shows its own progress bar with 'N of M paid' (or a green '✓ All paid' when the whole check is done, which also tints the paycheck label green). Cleaned up the 'nothing due to this paycheck' empty state. Purely visual — no behavior change.
